Our Story

Where luxury meets wellness

Relax Corner is Nizampet's premier massage and wellness center, designed to give you a true escape from daily stress. Our beautifully designed studio — with its iconic green living wall, warm lighting, and premium massage chairs — creates the perfect environment for deep relaxation.

We offer a range of therapies including full body massage chairs, traditional Kansya Thali foot massage, and foot & calf massage — all at incredibly affordable prices so everyone can experience the gift of relaxation.

📍 Shop No: 01, Road No: 8, Bandari Layout, Nizampet - 500090  |  📞 99497 69049 / 96666 08433

Why massage?

Health Benefits

🔥

Rapid Relief from Back & Neck Pain

The targeted rollers physically break down micro-knots in the upper shoulders, lower back, and glutes, while heat therapy increases tissue elasticity — instantly reducing stiffness and melting away deep-seated aches.

💪

Accelerated Muscle Recovery

The kneading and tapping motions flush out lactic acid from fatigued tissues, while rhythmic airbag compression mimics lymphatic drainage — bringing oxygen-rich blood to muscles and drastically reducing post-activity soreness.

😌

Immediate Stress Reduction

The soothing rhythm lowers cortisol (stress hormone) while boosting serotonin and dopamine production — shifting your nervous system into a calm, parasympathetic state and easing mental anxiety and tension.

🩸

Enhanced Blood & Lymph Circulation

The squeeze-and-release action of the airbags forces stagnant blood out of the limbs and back toward the heart, while rolling mechanisms stimulate micro-circulation — ensuring your cells receive fresh nutrients and oxygen.

🦴

Decompression of the Spine

The Zero-Gravity position eliminates downward pressure of your body weight. Combined with automated yoga-stretch programs, it creates gentle spinal traction — opening space between vertebrae and relieving compressed nerves.

💧

Reduced Swelling in Feet & Calves

The dedicated calf and foot enclosures use intense upward compression alongside reflexology rollers to pump trapped fluids out of the lower limbs — immediately relieving that heavy, tired feeling in your legs.

🧘

Improved Posture & Spinal Alignment

By systematically loosening tight major muscle groups — like the pectorals, rhomboids, glutes, and hamstrings — the massage allows your body to naturally reset into its correct, upright posture without conscious effort.

😴

Deeper, High-Quality Sleep

A 15–20 minute gentle session before bed lowers your heart rate, relaxes skeletal muscles, and primes your brain for the deep, restorative stages of sleep (REM and deep slow-wave sleep).

🤸

Increased Joint Flexibility

The stretching and multi-angle manipulation helps lubricate joints with synovial fluid and stretches tight tendons — making everyday movements like bending, twisting, and reaching much smoother and pain-free.

🛡️

Convenient Wellness Routine

No scheduling or travel required — getting a highly effective full-body treatment daily or weekly builds cumulative benefits, preventing minor muscle tightness from escalating into chronic injury.

👁️

Improves Vision

Kansya metal draws out excess heat from the eyes through the foot's reflex zones, improving eyesight and reducing strain.

😰

Reduces Anxiety

Calms the nervous system, significantly reducing stress, anxiety, and mental fatigue.

🩸

Boosts Circulation

Stimulates nerve endings and powerfully improves blood flow throughout the body.

🌿

Detoxifies Body

Draws out toxins from internal organs through the foot's reflex zones, supporting healthy digestion.

⚡

Balances Doshas

Harmonizes Vata, Pitta, and Kapha energies in the body for complete wellbeing.

✨

Glowing Skin

Restores luster, renews skin tissues and rejuvenates the natural glow of your feet and legs.

With Sesame Oil

🌾 Sesame Oil (Til Taila) — 10 Benefits

In Ayurveda, sesame oil is the "king of oils" — warming, deeply penetrating & nourishing. Best for balancing Vata dosha.

🧠

Calms the Nervous System

Its warming qualities deeply soothe frayed nerves, significantly reducing anxiety, stress, and mental fatigue.

😴

Combats Insomnia

Massaging feet with warm sesame oil induces deep grounding, promoting a sound and restful sleep cycle.

💪

Alleviates Joint & Muscle Pain

Its high penetration capacity reduces stiffness, soreness, and localized pain in ankles, calves, and feet.

⚡

Balances Vata Dosha

Counteracts the dry, cold, and erratic energy of Vata, which is primarily located in the lower extremities.

✨

Heals Dry, Cracked Heels

Provides intense lubrication, deeply moisturizing coarse skin and restoring elasticity to worn-out soles.

🩸

Improves Blood Circulation

The combination of friction from the bronze bowl and heating nature of the oil powerfully boosts blood flow throughout the legs.

🦵

Reduces Muscle Cramps

Regular application relieves lower limb fatigue and prevents painful nocturnal calf and foot cramps.

🤸

Enhances Foot Mobility

Lubricates the smaller joints and ligaments of the foot, improving flexibility and reducing rigidity.

🛡️

Antioxidant Defense

Rich in sesamol and vitamin E, it helps repair cell damage and rejuvenates the skin tissues of the feet.

🌿

Grounds Natural Energy

Anchors restless mental energy by stimulating the Marma (vital energetic) points on the soles of the feet.

With Coconut Oil

🥥 Coconut Oil (Nariyal Taila) — 10 Benefits

Naturally cooling (Sheeta) and hydrating. Ideal for clearing excess body heat, soothing inflammation, and balancing Pitta dosha.

🌡️

Reduces High Body Heat

Works with the bronze metals to pull out excess internal heat, relieving burning sensations in the eyes or stomach.

🧊

Soothes Burning Feet

Instantly cools hot, throbbing, or irritated feet after a long day of standing or walking.

⚡

Balances Pitta Dosha

Its cooling and calming nature directly pacifies aggressive, fire-element imbalances in the body.

👁️

Relieves Eye Strain

Foot reflexology points linked to the eyes help reduce eye strain and dark circles through a cooling massage.

🛡️

Fights Infections

Natural lauric acid content provides antimicrobial benefits, protecting toes and nails from athlete's foot and fungal conditions.

✨

Lightweight Hydration

Moisturizes without heavy residue, making it ideal for hot weather or naturally oily skin types.

🌿

Aids Detoxification

Mobilizes toxins through foot reflex zones, supporting healthy digestion and internal organ function.

🌸

Calms Skin Conditions

Gently pacifies redness, itching, or minor skin rashes on the lower legs and feet.

🧠

Eases Acidity & Headaches

By reducing systemic heat, a coconut oil session helps mitigate heat-induced headaches and acid reflux.

😌

Deep Relaxation

Offers a profoundly refreshing experience without inducing sluggishness, perfect for warm constitutions.

🦶

Relieves Foot Pain

The rollers deeply knead the arches and soles, providing relief from conditions like plantar fasciitis and general soreness.

💪

Loosens Tight Calves

The upper part of the massager targets tight calf muscles, melting away knots built up from exercise, walking, or wearing high heels.

🩸

Boosts Blood Circulation

The squeezing action forces stagnant blood out of the lower extremities and pumps fresh, oxygen-rich blood back down.

💧

Reduces Swelling

Dynamic compression helps flush out trapped lymphatic fluids, reducing swelling (edema) in the feet and ankles.

🧠

Lowers Stress & Anxiety

Stimulating the nerve endings in your feet triggers the nervous system to relax, rapidly lowering cortisol levels.

⚡

Alleviates Muscle Cramps

Regular use prevents the stiffness that causes painful nighttime foot and calf spasms.

🤸

Improves Flexibility

By stretching and kneading the tendons around the ankle and Achilles, it keeps your joints flexible and range of motion strong.

😴

Promotes Better Sleep

A session before bed shifts your body into a resting state, helping you fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer.

👁️

Activates Reflexology Points

Massaging specific zones on the feet can stimulate corresponding organs and promote overall body balance.

🏃

Speeds Up Recovery

Helps flush out metabolic waste like lactic acid from leg muscles after a heavy workout or a long run.
